response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with genuine geospatial domain exposure through founding GISCollective and building GIS tooling for Green Map, plus proven low-latency systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, the role's primary requirement is modern C++ (or Rust) in a commercial setting, and his only C++ experience is a brief seven-month stint at National Instruments ending in 2015; his systems work since then has been in DLang and his recent years are TypeScript/Node full-stack. He has no direct routing, tiling, or navigation pipeline experience, so the fit hinges on transferability rather than demonstrated capability.
strengths: Real geospatial experience: founded GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform, and built GIS apps used by Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) on infrastructure handling millions of requests per second
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, Linux, Docker, and a long track record across the full stack
concerns: Modern C++ experience is minimal and dated (short 2014-2015 role); no Rust experience listed
No routing, map tiling, or navigation guidance systems experience
Recent work (2020-present) is web-focused TypeScript/Node, far from systems-level pipeline engineering
